comment: 44yo female, ulcerative colitis diagnosed at age 22 (22-year duration, extensive colitis, on biologic therapy). No current CRC. Engine routes to PreventionPlan: standard = surveillance colonoscopy with random + targeted biopsies q1-2y (chromoendoscopy preferred per AGA), discussion of dysplasia management; alternative = q3-5y colonoscopy cadence. Validates v0.3 IBD → CRC prevention pilot.
